articles.title: Bhutan ‘doesn’t recall’ selling any bitcoin, disputing widely-tracked $1 billion BTC drawdown
articles.description: Arkham Intelligence data shows that over $1 billion in bitcoin has left wallets attributed to Bhutan in the past year, flowing to exchanges and trading firms. The country says it has not sold any.

articles.title: US CLARITY Act brings ‘major spike of euphoria’ to Bitcoin: Santiment
articles.description: Santiment warned that the crypto market “typically” moves against crowd expectations, pointing to a recent rise in bullish sentiment driven by renewed momentum around the US CLARITY Act.

articles.title: House committee leaders urge Trump to nominate CFTC members, citing CLARITY Act
articles.description: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission is currently headed by Chair Michael Selig, with no public statement from Donald Trump about fully staffing the five-member panel of commissioners.

articles.title: Bitcoin Depot filing casts doubt on company’s future amid lawsuits
articles.description: The crypto ATM company reported financial difficulties amid a changing regulatory environment and ongoing litigation, which have cost it millions of dollars.

articles.title: ICE, CME press US regulators to 'rein in' Hyperliquid energy trading: Report
articles.description: The Hyperliquid decentralized exchange allows anyone who stakes 500,000 HYPE tokens, valued at roughly $22.2 million, to deploy new markets.

articles.title: U.S. House lawmakers who oversee the CFTC are urging Trump to fill the commission
articles.description: As the Commodity Futures Trading Commission takes on a growing task to police U.S. crypto trading, senior lawmakers are saying it needs bipartisan leadership.

articles.title: Solayer launches Visa-compatible card for USDC payments
articles.description: The new card lets users spend USDC balances through online, in-store and contactless transactions while accessing ATM withdrawals in supported regions.

articles.title: RJ Scaringe has raised more than $12B across three startups and investors still want more
articles.description: Investors can't seem to get enough of RJ Scaringe or his ideas. Storytelling and communication are one of his superpowers, according to Jiten Behl, who joined Rivian when the company had just a handful of employees.

articles.title: General Catalyst posted VC rage bait and it worked, especially on a16z
articles.description: Compulsive X user Marc Andreessen himself couldn't resist responding, many, many times.

articles.title: SpaceX targets June 11 IPO pricing, picks Nasdaq for historic market debut
articles.description: Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite company has accelerated plans for its blockbuster public offering, with trading expected to begin as early as June 12 after a faster-than-expected SEC review.

articles.title: A hotel check-in system left a million passports and driver’s licenses open for anyone to see
articles.description: The tech company that maintains the hotel check-in system set its cloud storage to public, allowing anyone to access customers' data without a password.
